name: Into the Abyss
short_description: You are Sonja, a student of necromancy fighting to rid the world of a terrible illness that's taking the lives of all mankind. Fight alongside a zombie, a witch and even death in this exciting journey of persistence, friendship and determination!
detailed_description:
STORY:


Into the Abyss is a retro 2D-RPG with a classic vibe and exciting storyline.

You are Sonja, a student of necromancy fighting to rid the world of a terrible illness that's taking the lives of all mankind, even your loved ones.
Fight alongside a zombie, a witch and even death in this exciting journey of persistence, friendship and determination.

FEATURES:


  • Classic Storyline
  • Witty Dialogue
  • Innovative Party Members

MORE GAMES:
